title: erodium cedrorum subsp. cedrorum
intro: Erodium cedrorum subsp. cedrorum, also known as the Heron's Bill or Cedron's Heron's Bill, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Geranium family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erodium cedrorum subsp. cedrorum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Erodium cedrorum subsp. cedrorum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine for its expectorant properties.
